description: Per-theme motion overrides for the ROLR prediction-market book. Liveness-forward: the surface is alive because the market is. Pulses are organic (ease-in-out), data streams in real time, settlements celebrate.

liveness_budget.live_pulse: unlimited (presence dots are cheap and meaningful)

notes: ambient=ease-in-out (organic) is the ROLR signature and the inverse of revenant-dark's mechanical linear. A live market should feel like it's breathing, not ticking. pop uses a slight overshoot for number/badge changes — the only place ROLR allows spring-like motion.
